## Meeting Purpose

[Review the sales pipeline to secure March kickoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**March Kickoff Target:** Secure 2 deals/week to hit the 4–6 week booking target.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Contract Bottleneck:** Legal reviews are slowing deals. Andrea will now provide redlines with rationale to accelerate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Software Line Item:** Add the software line item to all contracts, referencing a URL for T\&Cs until formal language is drafted.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Pipeline Strategy:** Actively pursue all leads to fill the calendar, using a "discount vs. opt-out" trade-off to close deals.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Health & March Kickoffs

  - [**Goal:** Secure 2 deals/week to achieve the 4–6 week booking target.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Confirmed Kickoffs:**](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Feb 23:** 1 deal signed.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**March 2:** Marcel's deal signing tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**March 2 Target Kickoffs:**](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
      - [**Knox:** Redlines returned; signing expected early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
      - [**Binti:** SoW review today; pursuing an upfront annual payment discount.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Nerdio:** Team is confident; Tyler to send contract.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [**Chorologics:** Marcel's in-person meeting tomorrow is the key determinant.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [**Backup Leads:** RunLayer and Atria are being pursued to fill any gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

### Contract Process Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** Legal reviews are slowing deals (e.g., Knox, Vercel).](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Cause:** The contract template's vague language (e.g., indemnity, LOL) requires extensive redlining.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Solution:** Andrea will now provide redlines with rationale to accelerate reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Guidance:** Prioritize fixing critical risks (e.g., uncapped indemnities) while accepting minor ambiguities to avoid delays.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Software Line Item Strategy

  - [**Requirement:** The software line item must be on all contracts to capture ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Blocker:** No formal legal language exists for the line item.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Solution:** Reference a T\&C URL in the contract as a temporary workaround.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Timeline:** A stronger OS demo is ready next week, with client access available in mid-March.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Pipeline Strategy & Lead Management

  - [**Directive:** Actively pursue all leads to fill the calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [**Rationale:** A full calendar creates urgency and improves leverage with priority logos.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**RunLayer:** Re-engage despite concerns about price and difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Atria:** Pursue, using new data that blogs are the most cited content to position our editorial approach as programmatic.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [**Negotiation Tactic:** Use a "discount vs. opt-out" trade-off to close deals.](https://fathom.video/share/gFbrP1Z12dEoUNZg-XsjgJp4V_Pqvjt7?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
